Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.SwingAgiConfig.UITheme

Packages that use SwingAgiConfig.UITheme
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.render
Provides specialized Swing renderers and utility classes for media and HTML content.

    Method
